task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS dashboard or appointments calendar is visible, indicating the agent is no longer on the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the schedule for 'Dr. Schedule Test' for tomorrow's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The appointments calendar view shows 'Dr. Schedule Test' selected or visible in the provider list/filter, the date is set to tomorrow, and the original 09:00 AM to 05:00 PM block is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the edit dialog or form for the existing 09:00 AM to 05:00 PM appointment block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, popup, or form is open showing the details of the appointment block for 'Dr. Schedule Test' with the original times (09:00 AM to 05:00 PM).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent changed the end time of the appointment block to 12:00 PM (noon) while keeping the start time at 09:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The end time field in the edit form displays '12:00 PM' or '12:00', and the start time field remains '09:00 AM' or '09:00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the changes and the updated schedule block is visible on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view now shows the appointment block for 'Dr. Schedule Test' starting at 09:00 AM and ending at 12:00 PM. A success message or the visually shortened block on the calendar grid should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenMRS web interface rather than using terminal commands to modify the schedule.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser window with the OpenMRS UI, mouse clicks, and typed text in the web forms, not a terminal window executing curl or API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar shows 'http://localhost/openmrs/spa/appointments/calendar' and the interface matches the OpenMRS SPA design.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly typing REST API endpoints into the browser address bar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows standard frontend routes rather than raw JSON API endpoints (like /ws/rest/v1/appointmentBlock).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target provider is 'Dr. Schedule Test'. The original appointment block is scheduled for tomorrow from 09:00 AM to 05:00 PM (09:00:00 to 17:00:00). The target end time is 12:00 PM (noon) (12:00:00). The start time must remain 09:00 AM. The task takes place at http://localhost/openmrs/spa/appointments/calendar.
